appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance section for harness milestone with assertion-to-test mapping, isolation rules, and testing approach documentation

frictions.description: CLI --output-format json/yaml emits progress messages ('Running N task(s)...', 'Completed: N passed...') to stdout via click.echo, mixed with the structured JSON/YAML manifest output. Piping stdout to a parser requires extracting the structured portion.
frictions.resolution: The structured manifest itself is valid JSON/YAML; progress messages can be filtered. This is a minor UX issue, not a functional failure.

summary: All 26 harness milestone assertions pass. 6 flow validator groups tested: result parser (44 tests), local runner (40 tests), Docker runner (44 tests), environments (47 tests), harness+telemetry (40 tests), and CLI+cross-area flows (CLI commands + 67 pytest tests). Total: 282+ tests verified. Docker integration tests ran successfully with real containers. CLI run subcommand executes tasks end-to-end with JSON/YAML output format support.
